disambiguation_rules.board: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (defined in SEC. 2(4))
disambiguation_rules.comptroller: Comptroller of the Currency (defined in SEC. 2(5))
disambiguation_rules.applicable payment stablecoin regulator: Entity-specific definition varying by issuer type (SEC. 2(2))

parsing_rules: Definition pattern: Numbered terms with 'means' and cross-references to external statutes or internal sections establish entity definitions with statutory citations

oddities.note: Document provided contains only the short title section (Section 1). Substantive content referenced in the summary (prohibitions on algorithmic stablecoins, registration requirements, $10 billion limits, safe harbors, inflation adjustments) is not present in the text provided. Full entity extraction would require Sections 2-3 and additional substantive provisions.
